state.next-action: Evolution turn checkpoints 1-9 shipped 2026-04-15. Uniform skill shape is live end-to-end. Done: 42.2-07 (references/skill-shape.md), 42.2-08 (install.js reads workflow: frontmatter with skill.json fallback + 13-case unit test), 42.2-09 (validator enforces workflow: pointer resolution + legacy skill.json migration warnings), 42.2-10 (four keeper authoring skills consolidated; gad-create-skill + gad-merge-skill + gad-quick-skill deleted; create-proto-skill renamed from gad-quick-skill with updated description/body for the gad-191 bundle contract), 42.2-11 (58 skill.json sidecars bulk-deleted; 41 skills gained workflow: frontmatter pointer, 19 use install.js fallback), 42.2-12 (gad evolution install verified handling proto-skill bundles via tests/evolution-install-bundle.test.cjs; promote has a known split gap deferred as follow-up), 42.2-14 (gad snapshot EQUIPPED SKILLS section emits workflow: pointer on each line), 42.2-15 (git mv skills/candidates/ → .planning/candidates/ + 11 hardcoded path refs updated across bin/gad.cjs + site/scripts/compute-self-eval.mjs). Blocked: 42.2-13 (end-to-end pipeline proof) gated on 42.2-06 (create-proto-skill implementation). Commits: 82e78b8, bfb2711, 0a49837, c571fde, a8584ac, d51e6aa + the 42.2-10/11 consolidation commits. Validator green, unit tests green (13+1 new cases). Next: either (a) task 42.2-06 to implement create-proto-skill and unblock 42.2-13, (b) follow-up to split workflow.md out of promoted bundles in gad evolution promote, or (c) return to phase 44.5 Project Editor work. Operator decides.
